parameters.name: transactionId
parameters.description: 19-digit transaction ID of the authorized payment.

request.description: JSON body. Capture request fields (amount, currency) are on the JS-rendered Capture sub-page and not in this source.

responses.description: HTTP 200 with the standard response envelope {returnCode, returnMessage, info}. returnCode 0000 = success; info present only on success.

missing: Capture request body fields not in this source (JS-rendered sub-page).
